comment: Niche-aligned HN comments fixture for demand-cluster TDD. Three latent intent clusters plus noise: (A) self-hosting Claude/MCP locally for indie dev, (B) using AI agents to write/edit shorts/YouTube content, (C) batch-API + cost-control patterns for solo builders. Plus a couple of off-niche distractors and a couple of non-question statements that must drop out.

posts.title: Claude Desktop + MCP servers — how are people running this locally?
posts.story_text: Want to wire a few MCP servers into Claude Desktop without paying for a VPS. Anyone got a clean local setup?

comments.text: How do I get Claude Desktop talking to a local MCP server without sse?
Anyone know if stdio MCP works reliably on macOS background?
Looking for a sample MCP config that actually runs as a solo creator setup, not the enterprise demo.
Is there a way to run Claude Desktop fully offline with a local model fallback?
MCP is great, no complaints.
How to debug an MCP server that silently dies after one tool call?
What's the best way to package an MCP server for non-technical creators to install?

posts.title: AI agents for solo creators — writing YouTube Shorts scripts
posts.story_text: Curious how indie creators are using agent loops to draft and edit shorts.

comments.text: How do I get an agent to write a YouTube Shorts hook that doesn't sound like ChatGPT?
Anyone know a good prompt chain for solo creators turning a single idea into 5 shorts variants?
What's the best way to score thumbnails before publishing? Need it cheap, single-creator scale.
Looking for a YouTube shorts agent template that actually iterates instead of one-shotting.
Is there a self-hosted equivalent of VidIQ for solo channel analytics?
Shorts are getting saturated.
How can I get an agent to fact-check a YouTube script before I record?
what's the right way to keep an agent on-brand across 20 shorts?

posts.title: Claude Batch API cost patterns for indie devs
posts.story_text: How are solo builders keeping daily Claude spend under $5 while still doing meaningful workflows?

comments.text: Anyone know how to estimate Batch API cost before submitting a 500-request job?
How do I cap daily Claude spend per agent in a solo-creator pipeline?
Is there a clean way to do prompt caching across batch requests for one indie project?
Looking for a cost dashboard that works for solo creators using the Anthropic SDK, not big teams.
What's the best way to split a long-running indie agent run across multiple Batch submissions?
Found a nice library for this last week.
How to avoid silent rate-limit downgrade in solo Claude Batch jobs?
Is there a way to fix the thermal throttling in the new iPhone?
How do I check the M4 chip temperature on macOS?
How do I keep my starter alive at 60F?
Anyone know the best flour for a dense crumb?

posts.title: AI tools for video editing — what's working for indie creators?
posts.story_text: Following up on the agents thread.

comments.text: How can I auto-caption my YouTube Shorts in my own voice using AI?
Anyone got an AI b-roll picker that doesn't pull generic stock footage?
Looking for an AI editing flow that respects beat sync for solo music creators.
Captions plugin is fine.
what's the best way to get consistent character thumbnails across a YouTube channel using AI image gen?
